title: Add tsk create --local routing
description: Default create writes to project/. --local writes to project-local/, creating it and .gitignore entry if missing.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.text: tsk create --local routing implemented in python/src/taskulus/cli.py and rust/src/cli.rs; ensure_project_local_directory handles gitignore.
